behavior: The reproducible database failure, saved-alert notification orchestration, dependency drift, and stale release records are corrected before the source candidate is called complete.
revision_scope: Verified working tree based on the recorded revision.
changes: Rebuilt the jobs FTS5 index and replaced invalid direct-update triggers with the documented delete-command and insert sequence.
Restored the previously skipped job-update integration test and proved updated terms are searchable.
Evaluated new notification candidates independently of aggregate dashboard counters for manual and automatic searches.
Added fail-first notification orchestration coverage for unchanged and zero aggregate high-match counts.
Refreshed exact direct dependencies, compatible lockfile entries, the Rust toolchain, and hosted action pins.
Corrected release-facing architecture, workspace, file-size, migration, and saved-alert records.
Built and verified a universal no-account package without changing user-level toolchain configuration.
Generated checksummed Agent Skills archives, an SPDX release SBOM, a manifest, and attestation subjects.

commands.relevant_result: All 19 application integration tests passed, including the restored job-update and search regression.
All 22 enabled storage integration tests passed.
commands.caveat: One pre-existing aggressive same-row concurrency stress test remains intentionally ignored because its documented SQLite locking pattern can hang.

commands.relevant_result: Both files and all 7 focused notification tests passed after the new tests failed against the original orchestration.
commands.caveat: The fail-first run produced zero notification evaluations in both new cases, as expected before the fix.

commands.relevant_result: The final source-state gate passed the harness, architecture, security, dependency, SQLx, duplication, test-quality, documentation, lint, type, build, 828-script-test, 2,926-frontend-test, runtime-smoke, and complete standard Rust lanes.
commands.caveat: The environment doctor reported local Node and npm versions newer than the repository-owned release baselines; all checks passed.

commands.relevant_result: All 286 browser journeys passed with zero unexpected, flaky, or skipped outcomes in 123,985.431 ms.
commands.caveat: The enforced budget was 240,000 ms and 320 tests.

commands.relevant_result: The complete Rust workspace passed with every optional feature enabled.
commands.caveat: Tests explicitly classified as live-network, model-download, environment-isolation, manual-browser, or hanging stress checks remained ignored.

commands.relevant_result: Strict Rust lint passed across the workspace with every optional feature enabled.
Advisories, bans, licenses, and source policy all passed.
Direct pins, compatible lockfile entries, runtime tools, package manager, overrides, and hosted action refs were current and exact.
commands.caveat: The final check was repeated after compatible transitive releases appeared during the first verification window.

commands.relevant_result: Package, lockfile, Tauri, and Cargo workspace metadata matched version 2.9.5.
Release policy, preflight, staged publication, package, checksum, SBOM, attestation, and public-verifier gates passed for 2.9.5.
commands.caveat: Public trust signing and notarization remain external release-execution requirements.

commands.relevant_result: The no-secret local package posture passed for each supported release target.
commands.caveat: Public release execution still requires the credentials named by the readiness report.

commands.relevant_result: The repository built the universal 2.9.5 no-account app and DMG using a generated isolated toolchain root.
commands.caveat: The first build attempt stopped before artifact creation because the host toolchain lacked the second architecture target; the isolated root supplied it without changing user-level configuration.

commands.command: npm run tauri:verify:macos -- --dmg target/universal-apple-darwin/release/bundle/dmg/JobSentinel_2.9.5_no-account_universal.dmg --expected-architectures x86_64,arm64 --expected-bundle-id com.jobsentinel.main --expected-product-name JobSentinel --expected-version 2.9.5 --expected-icon-file icon.icns --expected-minimum-system-version 13.0 --launch-smoke --install-smoke --require-checksum
commands.relevant_result: Checksum acc45f06ffdb3282dbda10c1fff127a43e659338c2b7fa396ec6175110076ab3, architecture slices, metadata, signature integrity, visible-window launch, private local-data permissions, isolated database creation, and copied-install launch all passed.
commands.caveat: The expected public trust rejection remains until release credentials and notarization are available.

commands.command: npm run release:skills -- --version 2.9.5 --out-dir target/release-audit && npm run release:sbom -- --platform macos --version 2.9.5 --out-dir target/release-audit --checksums-out target/release-audit/attestation-subjects.sha256 --require-artifacts
commands.relevant_result: Checksummed tar.gz and ZIP skill archives, a 1,438-package SPDX SBOM with 4,022 relationships, a manifest, and attestation subjects were generated against six staged assets and one installable asset.
commands.caveat: Generated audit artifacts were retained only through verification and were not published.
